text: MioVerse.ai platform launched, with live demos and research platforms for trial! Unifying Digital Human and Interactive World Models under one research umbrella.
Four papers are accepted to CVPR2026!
Released the Hive dataset — a 2k-hour high-quality synthetic audio dataset with noise-free segments from unconstrained recordings.
One paper is accepted to IMWUT 2026!
We debuted at SIGGRAPH Asia 2025 in Hong Kong with a Mio showcase, BoF session, and Shanda Tokyo Night dinner! Read more
Shanda AI Research Tokyo officially launches, bringing together researchers in vision, graphics, and multimodal AI.
